text: Here, in this space of glass, light, and reflection, I am confronted with the tension between isolation and connectivity. The transparent barrier of the glass wall divides but also invites curiosity. Stepping closer and entering the R+D exhibit, I encounter words about confusion and blurred perception; they resonate deeply. I feel both stimulated and unsettled—a sensation that arises when I realize how fragile and fleeting my own sense of clarity can be. This place offers both answers and more questions, making me feel alive and alert, but also a touch uncertain.
